Contracts For or Procurement of Livestock Products During the Period From , toJune 30, 1960August 30, 1960, , , permitted any agency or instrumentality of the United States, during the period from , to , to contract for or procure livestock products produced or processed by a slaughterer or processor which slaughters or handles for slaughter livestock by methods other than those designated and approved by the Secretary of Agriculture if such slaughterer or processor has contracted for the purchase of the equipment necessary to enable him to adopt such methods but such equipment has not been delivered to him.Pub.
